description: A designed graphic with a black headline on white reading 'LABOR DEPARTMENT LAUNCHES PROJECT FIREWALL CRACKING DOWN ON H-1B VISA FRAUD'. Below are social-media share icons, and a photo of a large government building hung with two tall banners that read 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST', flanking a central American flag.
notable_text: LABOR DEPARTMENT LAUNCHES 'PROJECT FIREWALL' CRACKING DOWN ON H-1B VISA FRAUD; AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST
